title: ImportGeneratedResult v1
description: Result of node.import_generated. imported lists the engine-minted ids in candidate order; pack_artifact_ref points at the archived pack (verbatim pack + the engine-assembled nodes), and pack_hash pins the pack content (sha256 over its canonical JSON). These recorded values are also the crash-recovery probe data: a retried import commits only when every recorded node exists with a value-equal immutable projection, the pack artifact matches pack_hash, the node log carries one create entry per node, and campaign usage is consistent.

rejected_count.description: Echo of the pack's rejected_candidates length (the operator's own drops, archived with the pack).

archive_hash.description: sha256 over the canonical JSON of the ENTIRE archived artifact (verbatim pack + pack_hash + engine-assembled nodes). Crash recovery verifies this before completing any effect from the archive, so the engine-assembled node payloads it re-writes are exactly the schema-validated ones the original execution produced — pinned, not trusted.
